title: スプリンターズSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O is determined to make this
race the turning point in her dash down the
Bakushin Road...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is a race any sprinter dreams of winning...
And she's set to cross paths with Nishino Flower,
her strongest competition!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see her off, praying for the best... and hoping
this will let her compete in the following year
faster than ever.
